discipline.description:
Shields allies from harm and cures their wounds by smiting enemies.
Preferred Weapon: Staff, Wand, Dagger, Mace

left.name: Oracle
left.description: Oracles gain insight into the future and use it to protect and empower their allies. Their future sight grants Oracles the ability to bestow unique blessings and benefits upon their allies before they even know they are needed.

right.name: Voidweaver
right.description: Voidweavers have dedicated themselves to studying the origins of Void magic, and have discovered a way to tear open a tenuous connection to the Void. This power is incredibly dangerous and volatile, consuming anything in its path.

nodes.name: Power Infusion
nodes.description:
Infuses the target with power for 15 seconds, increasing haste by 20%.

Can only be cast on players.

nodes.name: Spiritual Guidance
nodes.description: Increases your Intellect by 3%.

nodes.name: Phantom Reach
nodes.description: Increases the range of most spells by 15%.

nodes.name: Phantasm
nodes.description: Activating Fade removes all snare effects.

nodes.name: Angelic Bulwark
nodes.description: When an attack brings you below 30% health, you gain an absorption shield equal to 25% of your maximum health for 20 seconds. Cannot occur more than once every 90 seconds.

choices.name: Benevolence
choices.description: Increases the healing of your spells by 3%.

choices.name: Focused Power
choices.description: Increases the damage of your spells by 3%.

nodes.name: Protective Light
nodes.description: Casting Flash Heal on yourself reduces all damage you take by 10% for 10 seconds.

nodes.name: Binding Heals
nodes.description: 20% of Flash Heal healing on other targets also heals you.

nodes.name: Light's Inspiration
nodes.description: Increases the maximum health gained from Desperate Prayer by 10%.

nodes.name: Angel's Mercy
nodes.description: Reduces the cooldown of Desperate Prayer by 20 seconds.

nodes.name: Twist of Fate
nodes.description: After damaging or healing a target below 35% health, gain 5% increased damage and healing for 8 seconds.

nodes.name: Translucent Image
nodes.description: Fade reduces damage you take by 10%.

nodes.name: Improved Fade
nodes.description: Reduces the cooldown of Fade by 5 seconds.

nodes.name: Strength of Resolve
nodes.description: Increases your Stamina by 6%.

nodes.name: Twin Disciplines
nodes.description: Increases the damage and healing of your Holy and Shadow spells by 2%.

nodes.name: Shackle Horror
nodes.description: Shackles an aberration or undead enemy for 50 seconds, preventing all actions and movement. Damage will cancel the effect. Limit 1.

choices.name: Sheer Terror
choices.description: Increases the amount of damage required to break your Psychic Scream by 25%.

choices.name: Petrifying Scream
choices.description: Psychic Scream causes enemies to tremble in place instead of fleeing in fear.

nodes.name: Inspiration
nodes.description: Reduces your target's physical damage taken by 5% for 15 seconds after a critical heal with Flash Heal or Penance.

nodes.name: Unwavering Will
nodes.description: While above 75% health, the cast time of your Flash Heal and Smite are reduced by 5%.

nodes.name: Move with Grace
nodes.description: Reduces the cooldown of Leap of Faith by 30 seconds.

nodes.name: Psychic Scream
nodes.description: Lets out a psychic scream, causing all enemies within 8 yards to flee, disorienting them for 8 seconds. Damage may interrupt the effect.

nodes.name: Everlasting Light
nodes.description: Surge of Light occurs up to 50% more often based on your missing mana.

nodes.name: Angelic Feather
nodes.description: Places a feather at the target location, granting the first ally to walk through it 40% increased movement speed for 5 seconds. Only 3 feathers can be placed at one time.

nodes.name: Improved Purify
nodes.description: Purify additionally removes all Disease effects.

choices.name: Psychic Voice
choices.description: Reduces the cooldown of Psychic Scream by 10 seconds.

choices.name: Void Tendrils
choices.description: Call shadowy tendrils to constrict enemies when Psychic Scream ends, rooting them in place for 4 seconds.

choices.name: Mind Control
choices.description: Controls a mind up to 1 level above yours for 30 seconds. Does not work versus Demonic, Undead, or Mechanical beings. Shares diminishing returns with other disorienting effects.

choices.name: Dominate Mind
choices.description: Controls a mind up to 1 level above yours for 30 seconds while still controlling your own mind. Does not work versus Demonic, Mechanical, or Undead beings or players. This spell shares diminishing returns with other disorienting effects.

nodes.name: Tithe Evasion
nodes.description: Shadow Word: Death deals 50% less damage to you.

nodes.name: Shadow Word: Death
nodes.description:
A word of dark binding that inflicts 10200 Shadow damage to your target. If your target is not killed by Shadow Word: Death, you take backlash damage equal to 5% of your maximum health.

Damage increased by 150% to targets below 20% health.

nodes.name: Mind Blast
nodes.description: Blast the target's mind for 9400 Shadow damage. Costs a high amount of mana.

nodes.name: Leap of Faith
nodes.description: Pulls the spirit of a party or raid member, instantly moving them directly in front of you.

nodes.name: Surge of Light
nodes.description: Your healing spells and Smite have a 8% chance to make your next Flash Heal instant and cost 50% less mana. Stacks to 2.

nodes.name: Improved Flash Heal
nodes.description: Increases healing done by Flash Heal by 15%.

nodes.name: Holy Nova
nodes.description: An explosion of holy light around you deals up to 4914 Holy damage to enemies and up to 3780 healing to allies within 12 yds, reduced if there are more than 5 targets.

nodes.name: Lightburst
nodes.description: Increases the damage of Holy Nova by 400%, its healing by 500%, and its cooldown by 30 seconds.

nodes.name: Twins of the Sun Priestess
nodes.description:
Power Infusion also grants you its effect at 100% value when used on an ally.

If no ally is targeted, it will grant its effect at 100% value to a nearby ally, preferring damage dealers.

nodes.name: False Autonomy
nodes.description: Increases the duration of Mind Control and Dominate Mind against enemy creatures by 15 seconds.

nodes.name: Painful Invocation
nodes.description: Increases the damage of Shadow Word: Pain by 10%.

nodes.name: Dispel Magic
nodes.description: Dispels Magic on the enemy target, removing 1 beneficial Magic effect.

nodes.name: Spell Warding
nodes.description: Reduces all magic damage taken by 3%.

nodes.name: Mindpierce
nodes.description: Increases the damage of Smite by 15%.

nodes.name: Desperate Prayer
nodes.description: Increases maximum health by 25% for 10 sec, and instantly heals you for that amount.

nodes.name: Spectral Illusion
nodes.description: Fade creates an illusion of you for 4 seconds, tricking enemies to attack it instead.

nodes.name: Fade
nodes.description: Fade out, removing all your threat and reducing enemies' detection range against you for 10 seconds.

nodes.name: Mental Agility
nodes.description: Reduces the mana cost of Purify and Mass Dispel by 50% and Dispel Magic by 10%.

nodes.name: Dark Enlightenment
nodes.description: Increases your haste by 3%.

nodes.name: Sanguine Teachings
nodes.description: Increases your Leech by 2%.

nodes.name: Mass Dispel
nodes.description: Dispels magic in a 15 yard radius, removing all harmful Magic from 5 friendly targets and 1 beneficial Magic effect from 5 enemy targets. Potent enough to remove Magic that is normally undispellable.

nodes.name: Body and Soul
nodes.description: Power Word: Shield and Leap of Faith increase your target's movement speed by 40% for 3 seconds.

choices.name: Ultimate Penitence
choices.description:
Ascend into the air and unleash a massive barrage of Penance bolts, causing 547200 Holy damage to enemies or 1281600 healing to allies over 6 seconds.

While ascended, gain a shield for 100% of your health. In addition, you are unaffected by knockbacks or crowd control effects.

choices.name: Power Word: Barrier
choices.description: Summons a holy barrier to protect all allies at the target location for 10 seconds, reducing all damage taken by 20% and preventing damage from delaying spellcasting.

nodes.name: Purge the Wicked
nodes.description: Holy damage increased by 10%.

nodes.name: Shadow Mend
nodes.description:
Shadow Word: Pain damage has a chance to upgrade your next Flash Heal to Shadow Mend. Stacks up to 2 charges.

Shadow Mend:
Wraps an ally in shadows which heal for 171000, but at a price.

The ally will take 8550 damage every 1 sec, until they have taken 85500 total damage from all sources, or leave combat.

nodes.name: Blaze of Light
nodes.description: The damage of Smite and Penance is increased by 8%, and Penance increases or decreases your target's movement speed by 25% for 2 seconds.

nodes.name: Greater Smite
nodes.description: Casting Smite increases the damage of Smite by 15%, stacking 2 times. Lasts 2 seconds.

nodes.name: Shadowfiend
nodes.description:
Shadow Word: Death has a 40% chance to summon a Shadowfiend for 5 second when damaging targets below 20% health.

Shadowfiend
Summons a Shadowfiend to attack your target for 5 seconds.

Generates 0.5% mana each time the Shadowfiend attacks.

choices.name: Archangel
choices.description: Evangelism increases your healing and absorption effects by 15% for 18 seconds.

choices.name: Mindbender
choices.description:
Evangelism summons a Mindbender to attack a nearby target for 12 seconds.

Generates 0.2% Mana each time the Mindbender attacks.

nodes.name: Borrowed Time
nodes.description: Casting Power Word: Shield increases your Haste by 5% for 4 seconds.

nodes.name: Weal and Woe
nodes.description:
Your Penance bolts increase the absorb of your next Power Word: Shield by 3%.

Stacks up to 10 times.

nodes.name: Castigation
nodes.description: Penance fires one additional bolt of holy light over its duration.

nodes.name: Indemnity
nodes.description: Atonements granted by Power Word: Shield last an additional 4 second.

nodes.name: Evangelism
nodes.description: Immediately Power Word: Radiance your target at 150% effectiveness, and causes your next 2 casts of Power Word: Radiance to be instant cast with 40% reduced mana cost.

nodes.name: Pain and Suffering
nodes.description: Increases the damage of Shadow Word: Pain by 15% and increases its duration by 2 seconds.

nodes.name: Encroaching Shadows
nodes.description: Shadow Word: Pain Spreads to a nearby enemy when you cast Penance on the target.

nodes.name: Revel in Darkness
nodes.description: Shadow Word: Pain deals 5% additional damage and spreads to 1 additional target when you cast Penance to its target.

nodes.name: Shadow Tap
nodes.description: Mind Blast deals 150% increased damage, but costs 40% more mana.

nodes.name: Occultist
nodes.description: Shadow damage and healing done increased by 15%.

nodes.name: Abyssal Reverie
nodes.description: Atonement heals for 5% more when activated by Shadow spells.

nodes.name: Expiation
nodes.description: Mind Blast and Shadow Word: Death consume 1 second of Shadow Word: Pain, dealing damage equal to 300% of the amount consumed.

nodes.name: Searing Light
nodes.description: Your Penance bolts sear the enemy, dealing 20% of its damage over 8 seconds.

nodes.name: Pain Suppression
nodes.description: Reduces all damage taken by a friendly target by 40% for 8 seconds. Castable while stunned.

choices.name: Pain Transformation
choices.description: Pain Suppression also heals your target for 15% of their maximum health and applies Atonement.

choices.name: Protector of the Frail
choices.description:
Pain Suppression gains an additional charge.

Power Word: Shield reduces the cooldown of Pain Suppression by 3 seconds.

nodes.name: Shield Discipline
nodes.description: When your Power Word: Shield is completely absorbed, you restore 0.5% of your maximum mana.

nodes.name: Holy Ray
nodes.description: Each successive Penance bolt during a channel deals 5% increased damage and healing.

choices.name: Bright Pupil
choices.description: Reduces the cooldown of Power Word: Radiance by 3 seconds.

choices.name: Enduring Luminescence
choices.description: Reduces the cast time of Power Word: Radiance by 30% and causes it to apply Atonement at an additional 10% of its normal duration.

nodes.name: Light's Promise
nodes.description: Power Word: Radiance gains an additional charge.

nodes.name: Power Word: Radiance
nodes.description: A burst of light heals the target and 4 injured allies within 40 yards for 55199, and applies Atonement for 60% of its normal duration.

nodes.name: Atonement
nodes.description:
Power Word: Shield, Flash Heal, Plea, Penance, and Power Word: Radiance apply Atonement to your target for 15 seconds.

Your spell damage heals all targets affected by Atonement for 35% of the damage done. Healing is reduced when healing more than 5 targets.

nodes.name: Power of the Dark Side
nodes.description: Shadow Word: Pain has a chance to empower your next Penance with Shadow, increasing its effectiveness by 30%.

nodes.name: Dark Indulgence
nodes.description: Mind Blast has a 100% chance to grant Power of the Dark Side and deals 20% additional damage.

nodes.name: Painful Punishment
nodes.description: Each Penance bolt extends the duration of Shadow Word: Pain on enemies hit by 1.5 seconds.

nodes.name: Lenience
nodes.description: Atonement reduces damage taken by 2%.

nodes.name: Divine Procession
nodes.description: Smite extends the duration of an active Atonement by 2 seconds.

nodes.name: Harsh Discipline
nodes.description: Power Word: Radiance causes your next Penance to fire 1 additional bolt, stacking up to 2 charges.

nodes.name: Inner Focus
nodes.description: Flash Heal, Power Word: Shield, Penance, and Power Word: Radiance have a 20% increased chance to critically heal.

nodes.name: Divine Aegis
nodes.description: Direct critical heals create a protective shield on the target, absorbing 30% of the amount healed. Lasts 15 seconds.

nodes.name: Eternal Barrier
nodes.description: Power Word: Shield absorbs 20% additional damage and lasts 5 seconds longer.

nodes.name: Sanctuary
nodes.description: Smite prevents the next 23760 damage dealt by the enemy.

nodes.name: Death's Torment
nodes.description: Shadow Word: Death deals damage 2 additional times at 15% effectiveness.

nodes.name: Inescapable Torment
nodes.description: Penance, Mind Blast and Shadow Word: Death cause your Shadowfiend, Mindbender, and Voidwraith to teleport behind your target, slashing up to 5 nearby enemies for 10898 Shadow damage and extending their durations by 0.7 second.

ranks.description:
Penance has a high chance to upgrade Power Word: Shield into Void Shield.

Void Shield:
Shields 3 allies for 15 seconds, absorbing 84000 damage.
Shadow damage and Atonement healing increased by 3%.
Void Shield reflects 25% of damage taken to enemies, causing Atonement healing.

nodes.name: Prompt Prognosis
nodes.description: The first bolt of each Penance cast damages or heals for 125% more.

nodes.name: Preemptive Care
nodes.description: Increases the duration of Atonement by 4 seconds.

choices.name: Divine Feathers
choices.description:
Your Angelic Feathers increase movement speed by an additional 10%.

When an ally walks through your Angelic Feather, you are also granted 100% of its effect.

choices.name: Save the Day
choices.description: For 6 seconds after casting Leap of Faith you may cast it a second time for free, ignoring its cooldown.

nodes.name: Waste No Time
nodes.description: Reduces the cooldown of Power Word: Shield by 1.5 seconds.

nodes.name: Guiding Light
nodes.description: Penance gains an additional charge.

nodes.name: Twinsight
nodes.description: 3 additional Penance bolts are fired at an enemy within 40 yards when healing an ally with Penance, or fired at an ally within 40 yards when damaging an enemy with Penance.

nodes.name: Foreseen Circumstances
nodes.description: Pain Suppression reduces damage taken by an additional 10%.

choices.name: Prophet's Will
choices.description: Your Flash Heal and Power Word: Shield are 30% more effective when cast on yourself.

choices.name: Desperate Measures
choices.description:
Desperate Prayer lasts an additional 10 seconds.

Angelic Bulwark's absorption effect is increased by 15% of your maximum health.

nodes.name: Assured Safety
nodes.description:
Power Word: Shield casts apply 4 stacks of Prayer of Mending to your target.

Prayer of Mending
Places a ward on an ally that heals them for 7320 the next time they take damage, and then jumps to another ally within 30 yds. Jumps up to 4 times and lasts 30 seconds after each jump.

nodes.name: Preventive Measures
nodes.description:
Power Word: Shield absorbs 30% additional damage.

All damage dealt by Penance, Smite and Holy Nova increased by 15%.

nodes.name: Piety
nodes.description: 20% of overhealing done is redistributed to up to 4 nearby injured allies.

nodes.name: Unfolding Vision
nodes.description: When Power Word: Shield or Void Shield expires with absorption remaining, it jumps to a nearby injured ally and loses 40% of its maximum absorb instead.

nodes.name: Words of the Wise
nodes.description: Flash Heal, Plea, and Power Word: Radiance healing increased by 15%.

nodes.name: Prophet's Insight
nodes.description: Atonement healing from Holy spells is increased by 15%.

nodes.name: Devour Matter
nodes.description: Shadow Word: Death consumes absorb shields from your target, dealing 30599 extra damage to them and granting you 1% mana if a shield was present.

nodes.name: Void Infusion
nodes.description: While Entropic Rift is active, Atonement healing with Void Blast and Penance is 50% more effective.

nodes.name: Inner Quietus
nodes.description: Power Word: Shield absorbs 20% additional damage.

nodes.name: Quickened Pulse
nodes.description: Shadow Word: Pain and Entropic Rift deal damage 25% more often.

choices.name: No Escape
choices.description: Entropic Rift slows enemies by up to 70%, increased the closer they are to its center.

choices.name: Dark Energy
choices.description: While Entropic Rift is active, you move 20% faster.

nodes.name: Collapsing Void
nodes.description:
Each time Penance damages or heals, Entropic Rift is empowered, increasing its damage and size by 10%.

After Entropic Rift ends it collapses, dealing 52800 Shadow damage split amongst enemy targets within 15 yds.

choices.name: Void Empowerment
choices.description: Summoning an Entropic Rift extends the duration of your 5 shortest Atonements by 1 second.

choices.name: Darkening Horizon
choices.description: Void Blast increases the duration of Entropic Rift by 1 sec, up to a maximum of 3 seconds.

choices.name: Void Leech
choices.description: Every 3 second siphon an amount equal to 4% of your health from an ally within 40 yds if they are higher health than you.

choices.name: Embrace the Shadow
choices.description: You absorb 3% of all magic damage taken. Absorbing Shadow damage heals you for 100% of the amount absorbed.

nodes.name: Void Blast
nodes.description:
Entropic Rift upgrades Smite into Void Blast while it is active.

Void Blast:
Sends a blast of cosmic void energy at the enemy, causing 18000 Shadow damage.

nodes.name: Voidwraith
nodes.description:
When Entropic Rift ends, a Voidwraith is summoned from the collapsed rift for 5 seconds.

Voidwraith
Summon a Voidwraith that casts Void Flay from afar. Void Flay deals bonus damage to high health enemies, up to a maximum of 50% if they are full health.

Generates 0.5% Mana each time the Voidwraith attacks.

nodes.name: Overwhelming Shadows
nodes.description: Mind Blast deals 100% increased damage.

nodes.name: Touch of the Void
nodes.description: Voidheart now persists for 8 second after Entropic Rift ends.

nodes.name: Voidheart
nodes.description: While Entropic Rift is active, your  [Atonement healing is increased by 20%].

nodes.name: Entropic Rift
nodes.description: Mind Blast tears open an Entropic Rift that follows the enemy for 8 seconds. Enemies caught in its path suffer 7200 Shadow damage every 1 second while within its reach.

holy.description: A versatile healer who can reverse damage on individuals or groups and even heal from beyond the grave. Preferred Weapon: Staff, Wand, Dagger, Mace

left.name: Oracle
left.description: Oracles gain insight into the future and use it to protect and empower their allies. Their future sight grants Oracles the ability to bestow unique blessings and benefits upon their allies before they even know they are needed.

right.name: Archon
right.description: Archons are highly devout and deeply connected to the Light and Shadow. Archons can be blessed from higher beings to enter into an ascended state, becoming an ultimate version of themselves.

nodes.description:
Infuses the target with power for 15 seconds, increasing haste by 20%.

Can only be cast on players.

nodes.description: Increases your Intellect by 3%.

nodes.description: Increases the range of most spells by 15%.

choices.description: Increases the damage of your spells by 3%.

nodes.description: Shadow Word: Death deals 50% less damage to you.

A word of dark binding that inflicts 10200 Shadow damage to your target. If your target is not killed by Shadow Word: Death, you take backlash damage equal to 5% of your maximum health.

Damage increased by 150% to targets below 20% health.

nodes.description: Increases healing done by Flash Heal by 15%.

nodes.description: Increases the damage of Holy Nova by 400%, its healing by 500%, and its cooldown by 30 seconds.

nodes.name: Holy Fire
nodes.description: Consumes the enemy in Holy flames that cause 36960 Holy damage and an additional 11869 Holy damage over 7 seconds.

If no ally is targeted, it will grant its effect at 100% value to a nearby ally, preferring damage dealers.

nodes.name: Painful Invocation
nodes.description: Increases the damage of Holy Fire and Shadow Word: Pain by 10%.

nodes.name: Dispel Magic
nodes.description: Dispels Magic on the enemy target, removing 1 beneficial Magic effect.

nodes.name: Spell Warding
nodes.description: Reduces all magic damage taken by 3%.

nodes.name: Mindpierce
nodes.description: Increases the damage of Smite by 15%.

nodes.name: Desperate Prayer
nodes.description: Increases maximum health by 25% for 10 sec, and instantly heals you for that amount.

nodes.description: Fade creates an illusion of you for 4 seconds, tricking enemies to attack it instead.

nodes.name: Fade
nodes.description: Fade out, removing all your threat and reducing enemies' detection range against you for 10 seconds.

nodes.name: Mental Agility
nodes.description: Reduces the mana cost of Purify and Mass Dispel by 50% and Dispel Magic by 10%.

nodes.name: Dark Enlightenment
nodes.description: Increases your haste by 3%.

nodes.name: Sanguine Teachings
nodes.description: Increases your Leech by 2%.

nodes.name: Mass Dispel
nodes.description: Dispels magic in a 15 yard radius, removing all harmful Magic from 5 friendly targets and 1 beneficial Magic effect from 5 enemy targets. Potent enough to remove Magic that is normally undispellable.

nodes.name: Body and Soul
nodes.description: Prayer of Mending and Leap of Faith increase your target's movement speed by 40% for 3 seconds.

nodes.name: Divine Image
nodes.description:
Your Holy Words summon an image of a Naaru at your side. For 9 seconds, whenever you cast a healing or damaging spell, the Naaru will cast a similar spell.

If an image has already been summoned, that image is empowered instead.

nodes.name: Lightweaver
nodes.description:
Flash Heal reduces the cast time of your next Prayer of Healing within 20 seconds by 30% and increases its healing done by 18%.

Can accumulate up to 4 charges.

choices.name: Dispersing Light
choices.description: 5% of healing done with Flash Heal is replicated to 4 injured allies within 40 yards.

choices.name: Trail of Light
choices.description: 25% of healing done by Flash Heal is replicated to the previous target you healed with those spells.

nodes.name: Radiant Plea
nodes.description: Increases Prayer of Mending healing by 15%.

nodes.name: Burning Vehemence
nodes.description:
Increases the damage of Holy Fire by 30%.

Holy Fire deals 75% of its initial damage to all nearby enemies within 12 yards of your target. Damage reduced beyond 5 targets.

nodes.name: Epiphany
nodes.description: Your Holy Words have a 25% chance to cause your next cast of Prayer of Mending to ignore its cooldown.

nodes.name: Desperate Times
nodes.description: Increases healing by 10% on friendly targets at or below 50% health.

nodes.name: Miracle Worker
nodes.description: Holy Word: Serenity and Holy Word: Sanctify gain an additional charge.

nodes.name: Prismatic Echoes
nodes.description: Increases the healing done by your Mastery: Echo of Light by 8% and your Renew by 20%.

nodes.name: Holy Celerity
nodes.description: Reduces the cooldown of your Holy Words by 15 seconds.

choices.name: Seraphic Crescendo
choices.description: Reduces the cooldown of Divine Hymn by 60 seconds.

choices.name: Gales of Song
choices.description: While channeling Divine Hymn, place 2 stacks of Prayer of Mending on up to 3 allies within its range every 1 second.

nodes.name: Apotheosis
nodes.description: Reset the cooldown of your Holy Words, and enter a pure Holy form for 20 seconds, increasing the cooldown reductions to your Holy Words by 200% and reducing their cost by 50%.

nodes.name: Say Your Prayers
nodes.description: Prayer of Mending has a 15% chance to not consume a charge when it jumps to a new target.

nodes.name: Prayers of the Virtuous
nodes.description: Prayer of Mending jumps 2 additional times.

nodes.name: Divine Service
nodes.description: Prayer of Mending heals 4% more for each bounce remaining.

nodes.name: Enlightenment
nodes.description: You regenerate mana 10% faster.

nodes.name: Censure
nodes.description: Holy Word: Chastise stuns the target for 4 seconds and is not broken by damage.

nodes.name: Voice of Harmony
nodes.description:
Prayer of Mending reduces the cooldown of Holy Word: Serenity by 4 seconds.

Holy Fire reduces the cooldown of Holy Word: Chastise by 4 seconds.

nodes.name: Divine Hymn
nodes.description:
Heals all party or raid members within 40 yards for 336528 over 5 seconds. Each heal increases all targets' healing taken by 4% for 15 seconds, stacking.

Healing reduced beyond 5 targets.

nodes.name: Uplifting Words
nodes.description: Increases the critical strike chance of your Holy Word: Serenity [ and Holy Word: Sanctify] by 10%.

nodes.name: Efficient Prayers
nodes.description: Reduces the mana cost of Prayer of Healing by 15%.

nodes.name: Angelic Touch
nodes.description: Your healing spells critically strike for 220% of healing done instead of the usual 200%.

nodes.name: Crisis Management
nodes.description: Increases the critical strike chance of Flash Heal and Prayer of Healing by 15%.

nodes.name: Light of the Naaru
nodes.description: The cooldowns of your Holy Words are reduced by an additional 10% when you cast the relevant spells.

nodes.name: Cosmic Ripple
nodes.description: When Holy Word: Serenity or Holy Word: Sanctify finish their cooldown, you emit a burst of light that heals up to 5 injured targets within 40 yards for 14723.

nodes.name: Holy Word: Sanctify
nodes.description:
Releases miraculous light at a target location, healing up to 5 allies within 10 yds for 60132.

Cooldown reduced by 6 seconds when you cast Prayer of Healing.

nodes.name: Prayer of Healing
nodes.description: A powerful prayer that heals your target and 4 injured allies within 40 yards for 69449.

nodes.name: Prayerful Litany
nodes.description: The primary target of Prayer of Healing is healed for 125% more.

nodes.name: Healing Focus
nodes.description: Reduces the mana cost of Flash Heal by 15%.

nodes.name: Afterlife
nodes.description: Increases the duration of Spirit of Redemption by 50% and the range of its spells by 50%.

choices.name: Restitution
choices.description: After Spirit of Redemption expires, you will revive at up to 100% health, based on your healing done during Spirit of Redemption. After reviving, you cannot benefit from Spirit of Redemption for 10 minutes.

choices.name: Guardian Angel
choices.description:
When Guardian Spirit saves the target from death, it does not expire.

When Guardian Spirit expires without saving the target from death, reduce its remaining cooldown to 60 seconds.

nodes.name: Guardian Spirit
nodes.description:
Calls upon a guardian spirit to watch over the friendly target for 10 seconds, increasing healing received by 60%. If the target would die, the Spirit sacrifices itself and restores the target to 40% health.

Castable while stunned. Cannot save the target from massive damage.

nodes.name: Holy Word: Serenity
nodes.description:
Perform a miracle, healing an ally for 214492.

Cooldown reduced by 6 seconds when you cast Flash Heal.

nodes.name: Holy Word: Chastise
nodes.description: Chastises the target for 46289 Holy damage and incapacitates them for 4 seconds.

nodes.name: Empyreal Blaze
nodes.description:
Holy Word: Chastise causes your next 2 casts of Holy Fire to be instant, cost no mana, and incur no cooldown.

Refreshing Holy Fire on a target now extends its duration by 7 seconds.

nodes.name: Light's Resurgence
nodes.description:
Your Prayer of Mending has a 12% chance to leave a Renew on each target it heals.

Renew
Fill the target with faith in the light, healing for 36556 over 15 seconds.

nodes.name: Renewed Faith
nodes.description: Your healing on allies with your Renew is increased by 10%.

nodes.name: Ultimate Serenity
nodes.description:
Increases the healing done by Holy Word: Serenity by 10% and causes it to heal 4 nearby injured allies within 40 yards for 15% of its healing done.

Talents that affect Holy Word: Sanctify instead affect Holy Word: Serenity.

nodes.name: Lasting Words
nodes.description:
Holy Word: Serenity applies 12 seconds of Renew to its target.

Holy Word: Sanctify applies 6 seconds of Renew to allies it heals.

Renew
Fill the target with faith in the light, healing for 29245 over 12 seconds.

nodes.name: Light in the Darkness
nodes.description:
Increases the healing done by Holy Word: Serenity and Holy Word: Sanctify by 13%.

Increases the radius of Holy Word: Sanctify by 15%.

nodes.name: Cosmic Wave
nodes.description: Increases Cosmic Ripple healing by 15%.

choices.name: Eternal Sanctity
choices.description: Increases the duration of Apotheosis by 12 seconds.

choices.name: Divinity
choices.description:
Your healing is increased by 10% while Apotheosis is active.

Casting Apotheosis causes your next 3 Prayer of Healing casts to be instant and heal for 25% more.

ranks.description: Prayer of Mending healing has a chance to upgrade your next Flash Heal to Benediction, healing the target for 30% more and causing a Cosmic Ripple.

Cosmic Ripple healing increased by 15%.

All healing done increased by 6%.

Each pulse of Divine Hymn emits a Cosmic Ripple at 75% effectiveness.

During Apotheosis, Flash Heal is upgraded to Benediction.

nodes.name: Prompt Prognosis
nodes.description: Casting Prayer of Mending heals your target for 112800.

nodes.name: Preemptive Care
nodes.description: Increases the duration of your Renew by 40%.

choices.name: Divine Feathers
choices.description:
Your Angelic Feathers increase movement speed by an additional 10%.

When an ally walks through your Angelic Feather, you are also granted 100% of its effect.

choices.name: Save the Day
choices.description: For 6 seconds after casting Leap of Faith you may cast it a second time for free, ignoring its cooldown.

nodes.name: Waste No Time
nodes.description: Reduces the cooldown of Prayer of Mending by 1.5 seconds.

nodes.name: Guiding Light
nodes.description: Prayer of Mending gains an additional charge.

nodes.name: Twinsight
nodes.description: An additional 4 stacks of Prayer of Mending is placed on a second ally within 40 yards when casting Prayer of Mending.

nodes.name: Foreseen Circumstances
nodes.description: Guardian Spirit lasts an additional 2 seconds.

choices.name: Prophet's Will
choices.description: Your Flash Heal and Holy Word: Serenity are 30% more effective when cast on yourself.

choices.name: Desperate Measures
choices.description:
Desperate Prayer lasts an additional 10 seconds.

Angelic Bulwark's absorption effect is increased by 15% of your maximum health.

nodes.name: Assured Safety
nodes.description:
Casting Prayer of Mending applies Power Word: Shield to your target.

Power Word: Shield
Shields an ally for 15 seconds, absorbing 55656 damage.

nodes.name: Preventive Measures
nodes.description:
Increases the healing done by Prayer of Mending by 15%.

All damage dealt by Smite, Holy Fire and Holy Nova increased by 40%.

nodes.name: Piety
nodes.description: 20% of overhealing done is redistributed to up to 4 nearby injured allies.

nodes.name: Unfolding Vision
nodes.description: When Prayer of Mending expires without healing, it jumps to a nearby injured ally and loses 2 stacks instead.

nodes.name: Words of the Wise
nodes.description: Holy Word: Serenity and Holy Word: Sanctify healing increased by 10%.

nodes.name: Prophet's Insight
nodes.description: Reduces the cooldown of your Holy Words by 5 seconds.

nodes.name: Resonant Energy
nodes.description: Allies healed by your Halo receive 2% increased healing from you for 8 seconds, stacking up to 5 times.

nodes.name: Perfected Form
nodes.description: Your healing done is increased by 10% while Apotheosis is active.

choices.name: Energy Compression
choices.description: Halo damage and healing is increased by 30%.

choices.name: Sustained Potency
choices.description:
Creating a Halo extends the duration of Apotheosis by 1 second. If Apotheosis is not active, up to 6 seconds is stored.

While out of combat or affected by a loss of control effect, the duration of Apotheosis is paused for up to 20 seconds.

nodes.name: Energy Conservation
nodes.description: Power Surge lasts an additional 5 seconds.

nodes.name: Power Surge
nodes.description: Casting Halo also causes you to create a Halo around you at 100% effectiveness every 5 sec for 10 seconds.

nodes.name: Energy Cycle
nodes.description: Consuming Surge of Light reduces the cooldown of Holy Word: Sanctify by 4 seconds.

choices.name: Shock Pulse
choices.description: Halo damage reduces enemy movement speed by 5% for 5 seconds, stacking up to 5 times.

choices.name: Incessant Screams
choices.description: Psychic Scream creates an image of you at your location. After 4 sec, the image will let out a Psychic Scream.

nodes.name: Empowered Surges
nodes.description: Your spells affected by Surge of Light heal for 5% more while Surge of Light is active.

nodes.name: Manifested Power
nodes.description:
Creating a Halo grants Surge of Light.

Surge of Light
Your healing spells and Smite have a 8% chance to make your next Flash Heal instant and cost 50% less mana. Stacks to 2.

nodes.name: Divine Halo
nodes.description: Halo now centers around you and returns to you after it reaches its maximum distance, healing allies and damaging enemies each time it passes through them.

nodes.name: Halo
nodes.description:
Creates a ring of Holy energy around you that quickly expands to a 40 yd radius, healing allies for 19320 and dealing 17304 Holy damage to enemies.

Healing reduced beyond 6 targets.

choices.name: Realized Potential
choices.description:
Flash Heal healing increased by 10%.

Healing spells and Smite have an additional 2% chance to grant Surge of Light.

choices.name: Spiritwell
choices.description:
Surge of Light can now be consumed by Prayer of Healing in addition to Flash Heal.

Surge of Light
Your healing spells and Smite have a 8% chance to make your next Flash Heal instant and cost 50% less mana. Stacks to 2.

choices.name: Word of Supremacy
choices.description: Power Word: Fortitude grants you an additional 5% stamina.

choices.name: Heightened Alteration
choices.description: Increases the duration of Spirit of Redemption by 5 seconds.

nodes.name: Focused Outburst
nodes.description: Prayer of Healing mana cost reduced by 10% and its cast time is reduced by 15%.

shadow.description: Uses sinister Shadow magic and terrifying Void magic to eradicate enemies. Preferred Weapon: Staff, Wand, Dagger, Mace

left.name: Archon
left.description: Archons are highly devout and deeply connected to the Light and Shadow. Archons can be blessed from higher beings to enter into an ascended state, becoming an ultimate version of themselves.

right.name: Voidweaver
right.description: Voidweavers have dedicated themselves to studying the origins of Void magic, and have discovered a way to tear open a tenuous connection to the Void. This power is incredibly dangerous and volatile, consuming anything in its path.

nodes.name: Power Infusion
nodes.description:
Infuses the target with power for 15 seconds, increasing haste by 20%.

Can only be cast on players.

nodes.name: Spiritual Guidance
nodes.description: Increases your Intellect by 3%.

nodes.name: Phantom Reach
nodes.description: Increases the range of most spells by 15%.

nodes.name: Phantasm
nodes.description: Activating Fade removes all snare effects.

nodes.name: Angelic Bulwark
nodes.description: When an attack brings you below 30% health, you gain an absorption shield equal to 25% of your maximum health for 20 seconds. Cannot occur more than once every 90 seconds.

choices.name: Benevolence
choices.description: Increases the healing of your spells by 3%.

choices.name: Focused Power
choices.description: Increases the damage of your spells by 3%.

nodes.name: Protective Light
nodes.description: Casting Flash Heal on yourself reduces all damage you take by 10% for 10 seconds.

nodes.name: Binding Heals
nodes.description: 20% of Flash Heal healing on other targets also heals you.

nodes.name: Light's Inspiration
nodes.description: Increases the maximum health gained from Desperate Prayer by 10%.

nodes.name: Angel's Mercy
nodes.description: Reduces the cooldown of Desperate Prayer by 20 seconds.

nodes.name: Twist of Fate
nodes.description: After damaging or healing a target below 35% health, gain 5% increased damage and healing for 8 seconds.

nodes.name: Translucent Image
nodes.description: Fade reduces damage you take by 10%.

nodes.name: Improved Fade
nodes.description: Reduces the cooldown of Fade by 5 seconds.

nodes.name: Strength of Resolve
nodes.description: Increases your Stamina by 6%.

nodes.name: Twin Disciplines
nodes.description: Increases the damage and healing of your Holy and Shadow spells by 2%.

nodes.name: Shackle Horror
nodes.description: Shackles an aberration or undead enemy for 50 seconds, preventing all actions and movement. Damage will cancel the effect. Limit 1.

choices.name: Sheer Terror
choices.description: Increases the amount of damage required to break your Psychic Scream by 25%.

choices.name: Petrifying Scream
choices.description: Psychic Scream causes enemies to tremble in place instead of fleeing in fear.

nodes.name: Inspiration
nodes.description: Reduces your target's physical damage taken by 5% for 15 seconds after a critical heal with Flash Heal.

nodes.name: Unwavering Will
nodes.description: While above 75% health, the cast time of your Flash Heal is reduced by 5%.

nodes.name: Move with Grace
nodes.description: Reduces the cooldown of Leap of Faith by 30 seconds.

nodes.name: Psychic Scream
nodes.description: Lets out a psychic scream, causing all enemies within 8 yards to flee, disorienting them for 8 seconds. Damage may interrupt the effect.

nodes.name: Everlasting Light
nodes.description: Surge of Light occurs up to 50% more often based on your missing mana.

nodes.name: Angelic Feather
nodes.description: Places a feather at the target location, granting the first ally to walk through it 40% increased movement speed for 5 seconds. Only 3 feathers can be placed at one time.

nodes.name: Purify Disease
nodes.description: Removes all Disease effects from a friendly target.

choices.name: Psychic Voice
choices.description: Reduces the cooldown of Psychic Scream by 10 seconds.

choices.name: Void Tendrils
choices.description: Call shadowy tendrils to constrict enemies when Psychic Scream ends, rooting them in place for 4 seconds.

choices.name: Mind Control
choices.description: Controls a mind up to 1 level above yours for 30 seconds. Does not work versus Demonic, Undead, or Mechanical beings. Shares diminishing returns with other disorienting effects.

choices.name: Dominate Mind
choices.description: Controls a mind up to 1 level above yours for 30 seconds while still controlling your own mind. Does not work versus Demonic, Mechanical, or Undead beings or players. This spell shares diminishing returns with other disorienting effects.

nodes.name: Tithe Evasion
nodes.description: Shadow Word: Death deals 50% less damage to you.

nodes.name: Shadow Word: Death
nodes.description:
A word of dark binding that inflicts 10200 Shadow damage to your target. If your target is not killed by Shadow Word: Death, you take backlash damage equal to 5% of your maximum health.

Damage increased by 150% to targets below 20% health.

Generates 0 Insanity.

nodes.name: Mind Blast
nodes.description:
Blast the target's mind for 9400 Shadow damage.

Generates 0 Insanity.

nodes.name: Leap of Faith
nodes.description: Pulls the spirit of a party or raid member, instantly moving them directly in front of you.

nodes.name: Surge of Light
nodes.description: Your healing spells and Smite have a 8% chance to make your next Flash Heal instant and cost 50% less mana. Stacks to 2.

nodes.name: Improved Flash Heal
nodes.description: Increases healing done by Flash Heal by 15%.

nodes.name: Holy Nova
nodes.description: An explosion of holy light around you deals up to 4914 Holy damage to enemies and up to 3780 healing to allies within 12 yds, reduced if there are more than 5 targets.

nodes.name: Lightburst
nodes.description: Increases the damage of Holy Nova by 400%, its healing by 500%, and its cooldown by 30 seconds.

nodes.name: Twins of the Sun Priestess
nodes.description:
Power Infusion also grants you its effect at 100% value when used on an ally.

If no ally is targeted, it will grant its effect at 100% value to a nearby ally, preferring damage dealers.

nodes.name: False Autonomy
nodes.description: Increases the duration of Mind Control and Dominate Mind against enemy creatures by 15 seconds.

nodes.name: Painful Invocation
nodes.description: Increases the damage of Shadow Word: Pain by 10%.

nodes.name: Dispel Magic
nodes.description: Dispels Magic on the enemy target, removing 1 beneficial Magic effect.

nodes.name: Spell Warding
nodes.description: Reduces all magic damage taken by 3%.

nodes.name: Mindpierce
nodes.description: Increases the damage of Mind Flay by 15%.

nodes.name: Desperate Prayer
nodes.description: Increases maximum health by 25% for 10 sec, and instantly heals you for that amount.

nodes.name: Spectral Illusion
nodes.description: Fade creates an illusion of you for 4 seconds, tricking enemies to attack it instead.

nodes.name: Fade
nodes.description: Fade out, removing all your threat and reducing enemies' detection range against you for 10 seconds.

nodes.name: Mental Agility
nodes.description: Reduces the mana cost of Purify Disease and Mass Dispel by 50% and Dispel Magic by 10%.

nodes.name: Dark Enlightenment
nodes.description: Increases your haste by 3%.

nodes.name: Sanguine Teachings
nodes.description: Increases your Leech by 2%.

nodes.name: Mass Dispel
nodes.description: Dispels magic in a 15 yard radius, removing all harmful Magic from 5 friendly targets and 1 beneficial Magic effect from 5 enemy targets. Potent enough to remove Magic that is normally undispellable.

nodes.name: Body and Soul
nodes.description: Power Word: Shield and Leap of Faith increase your target's movement speed by 40% for 3 seconds.

nodes.name: Idol of N'Zoth
nodes.description:
You create Horrific Visions when casting harmful spells on enemies.

At 50 stacks of Horrific Visions, your target sees a nightmare, dealing 21840 Shadow damage and granting you 4 Insanity over 3 seconds.

At 100 stacks, your target witnesses a vision of N'Zoth, dealing 82680 Shadow damage and granting you 12 Insanity over 3 seconds.

nodes.name: Idol of Y'Shaarj
nodes.description: While Shadowfiend, Mindbender, or Voidwraith are active, your haste is increased by 10%.

nodes.name: Idol of Yogg-Saron
nodes.description:
After conjuring Shadowy Apparitions, gain a stack of Idol of Yogg-Saron. At 20 stacks, you summon a Thing from Beyond that casts Void Spike at nearby enemies for 20 seconds.

Void Spike
Hurls a bolt of dark magic, dealing 11267 Shadow damage and 5972 Shadow damage to all enemies within 10 yards of the target. Damage reduced beyond 5 targets.

choices.name: Deathspeaker
choices.description:
Shadow Word: Death damage increased by 25%.

Shadow Word: Death gains its damage and talent bonuses against targets below 35% health instead of 20%.

choices.name: Death and Madness
choices.description:
If a target dies within 7 seconds after being struck by Shadow Word: Death, generate 8 Insanity.

When Shadow Word: Death fails to kill a target below 20% health, its cooldown is reset. Cannot occur more than once every 10 seconds.

nodes.name: Subservient Shadows
nodes.description: Summoned minions last 20% longer and deal an additional 15% damage.

nodes.name: Insidious Ire
nodes.description: While you have Shadow Word: Pain, Shadow Word: Madness, and Vampiric Touch active on the same target, your Mind Blast, Void Torrent, Mind Flay, and Void Volley deal 13% more damage.

nodes.name: Spectral Horrors
nodes.description: Shadow Apparitions deal 30% increased damage to targets affected by your Shadow Word: Madness.

nodes.name: Idol of C'Thun
nodes.description:
Mind Flay has a chance to spawn a Void Tendril that channels Mind Flay or Void Lasher that channels Mind Sear at your target.

Mind Flay
Assaults the target's mind with Shadow energy, causing 38615 Shadow damage over 10 seconds and slowing their movement speed by 30%.

Generates 5 Insanity over the duration.

Mind Sear
Corrosive shadow energy radiates from the target, dealing 25755 Shadow damage over 10 seconds to all enemies within 10 yards of the target. Damage reduced beyond 5 targets.

Generates 5 Insanity over the duration.

nodes.name: Inescapable Torment
nodes.description: Mind Blast and Shadow Word: Death cause your Shadowfiend, Mindbender, and Voidwraith to teleport behind your target, slashing up to 5 nearby enemies for 10078 Shadow damage and extending their durations by 0.7 second.

nodes.name: Mastermind
nodes.description: Increases the critical strike chance of Mind Blast, Mind Flay, and Shadow Word: Death by 4% and increases their critical strike damage by 20%.

nodes.name: Phantom Menace
nodes.description: Increases the critical strike chance of Shadowy Apparitions by 10% and their critical strike damage by 40%.

choices.name: Mind's Eye
choices.description: Reduces the Insanity cost of Shadow Word: Madness by 5.

choices.name: Distorted Reality
choices.description: Increases the damage of Shadow Word: Madness by 20% and causes it to deal its damage over 12 sec, but increases its Insanity cost by 5.

nodes.name: Mindbender
nodes.description:
Casting Voidform summons a Mindbender for 10 seconds.

Mindbender
Summons a shadowy fiend to attack your target.

Generates 1 Insanity each time the Mindbender attacks.

nodes.name: Screams of the Void
nodes.description: Shadow Word: Madness causes your Shadow Word: Pain and Vampiric Touch to deal damage 40% faster on all targets for 3 seconds.

nodes.name: Shadowy Apparitions
nodes.description: Shadow Word: Madness conjures Shadowy Apparitions that float towards all targets afflicted by your Vampiric Touch for 10206 Shadow damage.

nodes.name: Thought Harvester
nodes.description: Mind Blast gains an additional charge.

nodes.name: Maddening Tentacles
nodes.description: Tentacle Slam afflicts your target with Shadow Word: Madness at 25% effectiveness.

nodes.name: Crushing Void
nodes.description:
Tentacle Slam deals 50% increased damage and Void Volley deals 15% increased damage.

When Voidform ends, you can cast Void Volley 1 additional time within 30 seconds.

choices.name: Improved Voidform
choices.description: Voidform generates 60 Insanity and increases your spell damage by an additonal 5%.

choices.name: Ancient Madness
choices.description:
Casting Shadow Word: Madness increases the duration of Voidform by 3 seconds.

Each time this occurs during Voidform, its effectiveness is reduced by 25%.

nodes.name: Voidform
nodes.description:
Bombards your target with a Void Volley and twists your Shadowform with void magic, increasing your spell damage by 20% for 20 seconds.

This spell is replaced with Void Volley while Voidform is active.

Void Volley
Releases a volley of pure void energy, firing 10 bolts at your target and 1 :bolts.

Generates 10 Insanity.

nodes.name: Haunting Shadows
nodes.description:
Shadowy Apparition damage increased by 10%.

When Shadowy Apparitions deal damage, they extend the duration of your Shadow Word: Pain and Vampiric Touch on the target by 1 second.

nodes.name: Tormenting Whispers
nodes.description: Increases Shadow Word: Madness damage by 15%.

nodes.name: Dark Thoughts
nodes.description: Increases the chance for Shadowy Insight to occur by 25%. When consuming Shadowy Insight, Mind Blast generates 1 additional Insanity.

nodes.name: Maddening Touch
nodes.description: Vampiric Touch deals 20% additional damage and has a chance to generate 1 Insanity each time it deals damage.

nodes.name: Psychic Link
nodes.description:
Your direct damage spells inflict 25% of their damage on all other targets afflicted by your Vampiric Touch within 40 yards.

Does not apply to damage from Shadowy Apparitions, Shadow Word: Pain, and Vampiric Touch.

nodes.name: Shadow Word: Madness
nodes.description:
A word of madness haunts the target's mind, dealing 27300 Shadow damage instantly plus an additional 81900 Shadow damage over 6 seconds. Heals you for 30% of damage dealt.

When reapplied to a target, all remaining damage is added to the new effect.

choices.name: Misery
choices.description: Vampiric Touch also applies Shadow Word: Pain to the target. Shadow Word: Pain lasts an additional 5 seconds.

choices.name: Invoked Nightmare
choices.description: Shadow Word: Pain deals 150% increased damage.

nodes.name: Auspicious Spirits
nodes.description: Your Shadowy Apparitions deal 15% increased damage and have a chance to generate 1 Insanity.

nodes.name: Surge of Insanity
nodes.description: Mind Flay damage increased by 15% and Insanity generation increased by 30%.

nodes.name: Shadowy Insight
nodes.description: Shadow Word: Pain periodic damage has a chance to cause your next Mind Blast to be instant and ignore its cooldown.

nodes.name: Descending Darkness
nodes.description: Increases Tentacle Slam damage by 300%.

nodes.name: Madness Weaving
nodes.description: The damage bonus from your Mastery: Shadow Weaving gains 25% additional benefit from Shadow Word: Madness.

nodes.name: Tormented Spirits
nodes.description:
Your Shadow Word: Pain damage has a chance to create Shadowy Apparitions that float towards all targets afflicted by your Vampiric Touch.

Critical strikes increase the chance by 100%.

nodes.name: Tentacle Slam
nodes.description:
Summons a massive shadowy appendage to slam the ground, dealing 8255 Shadow damage in front of you and 8 yds around your target.

Applies Vampiric Touch to up to 6 enemies, prioritizing ones without Vampiric Touch.

Generates 6 Insanity.

nodes.name: Death's Torment
nodes.description: Shadow Word: Death deals damage 2 additional times at 15% effectiveness.

nodes.name: Mental Decay
nodes.description: Increases the damage of Mind Flay by 25%.

nodes.name: Shattered Psyche
nodes.description:
Mind Flay damage increases the critical strike chance of Mind Blast by 8%, stacking up to 12 times.

Lasts 10 seconds.

nodes.name: Dark Evangelism
nodes.description: Increases your periodic spell damage by 6%.

nodes.name: Voidtouched
nodes.description: Increases your Shadow Word: Madness damage by 6% and increases your maximum Insanity by 50.

nodes.name: Instilled Doubt
nodes.description: Increases the critical strike chance of Vampiric Touch and Shadow Word: Pain by 8% and their critical strike damage by 20%.

nodes.name: Mind Devourer
nodes.description: Mind Blast has a 8% chance to make your next Shadow Word: Madness cost no Insanity and deal 20% additional damage.

choices.name: Intangibility
choices.description: Dispersion heals you for an additional 25% of your maximum health over its duration and its cooldown is reduced by 30 seconds.

choices.name: Mental Fortitude
choices.description: Healing from Vampiric Touch and Shadow Word: Madness when you are at maximum health will shield you for the same amount. The shield cannot exceed 10% of your maximum health.

nodes.name: Shadowfiend
nodes.description:
Shadow Word: Death has a 40% chance to summon a Shadowfiend for 5 second when damaging targets below 20% health.

Shadowfiend
Summons a Shadowfiend to attack your target for 5 seconds.

Generates 1 Insanity each time the Shadowfiend attacks.

ranks.description: When an effect from an Idol is activated, conjure Shadowy Apparitions.

Shadowy Apparitions have a 15% chance to spawn as Void Apparitions that release a Void Bolt at their target and deal 50% increased damage.

Void Bolt
Sends a bolt of pure void energy at your target, dealing 18000 Shadow damage.

Tentacle Slam has a 100% chance to activate an effect from one of your Idols.

Idol of Y'Shaarj
Summons a Shadowfiend.

Idol of N'Zoth
Your target witnesses a nightmare or vision of N'Zoth.

Idol of Yogg-Saron
Summons a Thing From Beyond.

Idol of C'Thun
Summons a Void Tendril or Void Lasher.

nodes.description: Enemies damaged by your Halo take 2% increased damage from you for 8 seconds, stacking up to 5 times.

nodes.name: Perfected Form
nodes.description: Your damage dealt is increased by 5% while Voidform is active.

choices.name: Sustained Potency
choices.description:
Creating a Halo extends the duration of Dark Ascension by 1 second. If Dark Ascension is not active, up to 6 seconds is stored.

While out of combat or affected by a loss of control effect, the duration of Dark Ascension is paused for up to 20 seconds.

nodes.name: Energy Conservation
nodes.description: Power Surge lasts an additional 5 seconds.

nodes.name: Power Surge
nodes.description: Casting Halo also causes you to create a Halo around you at 100% effectiveness every 5 sec for 10 seconds.

nodes.name: Energy Cycle
nodes.description: Casting Mind Flay: Insanity has a 100% chance to conjure Shadowy Apparitions.

choices.name: Shock Pulse
choices.description: Halo damage reduces enemy movement speed by 5% for 5 seconds, stacking up to 5 times.

choices.name: Incessant Screams
choices.description: Psychic Scream creates an image of you at your location. After 4 sec, the image will let out a Psychic Scream.

nodes.name: Empowered Surges
nodes.description: Increases the damage done by Mind Flay: Insanity by 30%.

nodes.name: Halo
nodes.description:
Creates a ring of Shadow energy around you that quickly expands to a 40 yd radius, healing allies for 19320 and dealing 17304 Shadow damage to enemies. Healing reduced beyond 6 targets.

Generates 5 Insanity.

nodes.name: Manifested Power
nodes.description:
Creating a Halo upgrades your next Mind Flay to Mind Flay: Insanity.

Mind Flay: Insanity
Assaults the target's mind with Shadow energy, causing 65083 Shadow damage over 1.5 seconds and slowing their movement speed by 70%.

Generates 8 Insanity over the duration.

nodes.name: Divine Halo
nodes.description: Halo now centers around you and returns to you after it reaches its maximum distance, healing allies and damaging enemies each time it passes through them.

choices.name: Realized Potential
choices.description: Shadow Word: Death damage increased by 25% and its cooldown is reduced by 3 seconds.

choices.name: Spiritwell
choices.description: Increases Shadowy Apparition damage by 10%.

choices.name: Word of Supremacy
choices.description: Power Word: Fortitude grants you an additional 5% stamina.

choices.name: Heightened Alteration
choices.description: Increases the duration of Dispersion by 2 seconds.

nodes.name: Focused Outburst
nodes.description: Void Volley damage increased by 15% and its cooldown is reduced by 4 seconds.

nodes.name: Devour Matter
nodes.description: Shadow Word: Death consumes absorb shields from your target, dealing 30599 extra damage to them and granting you 5 Insanity if a shield was present.

nodes.name: Void Infusion
nodes.description: Void Blast generates 2 additional Insanity.

nodes.name: Inner Quietus
nodes.description: Vampiric Touch and Shadow Word: Pain deal 20% additional damage.

nodes.name: Void Torrent
nodes.description:
Channel a torrent of void energy into the target, dealing 85566 Shadow damage over 3 seconds and tearing open an Entropic Rift.

Entropic Rift
Tear open a rift that follows the enemy for 8 seconds. Enemies caught in its path suffer 7200 Shadow damage every 1 second while within its reach.

Generates 24 Insanity over the duration.

nodes.name: Quickened Pulse
nodes.description: Shadow Word: Pain and Entropic Rift deal damage 25% more often.

choices.name: No Escape
choices.description: Entropic Rift slows enemies by up to 70%, increased the closer they are to its center.

choices.name: Dark Energy
choices.description: Void Torrent can be used while moving. While Entropic Rift is active, you move 20% faster.

nodes.name: Collapsing Void
nodes.description:
Each time you cast Shadow Word: Madness, Entropic Rift is empowered, increasing its damage and size by 20%.

After Entropic Rift ends it collapses, dealing 52800 Shadow damage split amongst enemy targets within 15 yds.

choices.name: Void Empowerment
choices.description: Summoning an Entropic Rift grants you Shadowy Insight.

choices.name: Darkening Horizon
choices.description: Void Blast increases the duration of Entropic Rift by 1 sec, up to a maximum of 3 seconds.

choices.name: Void Leech
choices.description: Every 3 second siphon an amount equal to 4% of your health from an ally within 40 yds if they are higher health than you.

choices.name: Embrace the Shadow
choices.description: You absorb 3% of all magic damage taken. Absorbing Shadow damage heals you for 100% of the amount absorbed.

nodes.name: Void Blast
nodes.description:
Entropic Rift upgrades Mind Blast into Void Blast while it is active.

Void Blast:
Sends a blast of cosmic void energy at the enemy, causing 25200 Shadow damage.

Generates 0 Insanity.

nodes.name: Voidwraith
nodes.description:
When Entropic Rift ends, a Voidwraith is summoned from the collapsed rift for 5 seconds.

Voidwraith
Summon a Voidwraith that casts Void Flay from afar. Void Flay deals bonus damage to high health enemies, up to a maximum of 50% if they are full health.

Generates 1 Insanity each time the Voidwraith attacks.

nodes.name: Overwhelming Shadows
nodes.description: Void Torrent deals 30% increased damage.

nodes.name: Touch of the Void
nodes.description: Voidheart now persists for 8 second after Entropic Rift ends.

nodes.name: Voidheart
nodes.description: While Entropic Rift is active, your Shadow damage is increased by 5% [Atonement healing is increased by 20%].
